issues.description: Action type is 'SearchDeck' but card effect places character at bottom of deck, not onto board. Should use 'ReturnToHand' or similar deck-placement action, or clarify the destination as deck bottom.
Destination is 'board' but effect text states 'at the bottom of the owner's deck'. Destination should be 'deck' with position 'bottom'.
Filter requires 'Character' type specification. Current filter only specifies cost; must add 'cardType':'Character' to match 'Character with a cost of 2 or less'.
